DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILBERT, MAHALIA
ORDER ON CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF MAHALIA GILBERT FOR HER FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT ORDER THAT SHE RESPOND TO DISCOVERY

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR HER FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER THAT SHE RESPOND TO DISCOVERY - PETER KEITH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CCSF. PLAINTIFF MAHALIA GILBERT APPEARING IN PRO PER. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS DENIED AS IT SEEKS TERMINATING SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHOUT OBJECTIONS ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 9, 2004. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TIMELY TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $474, PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. WRITTEN NOTICE OF THIS ORDER IS WAIVED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/EAHEWLETT)
